rules.threat: A storage account that allows plaintext HTTP lets blob traffic and SAS tokens be intercepted on the wire.
rules.title: Storage account must require secure transfer (HTTPS only)
requiredActions: Set enable_https_traffic_only = true on the azurerm_storage_account so only TLS connections are accepted.

rules.threat: Allowing TLS 1.0/1.1 to a storage account exposes data to downgrade and known TLS weaknesses.
rules.title: Storage account must require TLS 1.2 minimum
requiredActions: Set min_tls_version = "TLS1_2" on the azurerm_storage_account.

rules.threat: Allowing public blob containers lets anonymous users enumerate and download objects.
rules.title: Storage account must disallow public blob access
requiredActions: Set allow_nested_items_to_be_public = false on the azurerm_storage_account.

rules.threat: Without purge protection, an attacker (or accident) can permanently delete the Key Vault and its secrets, destroying recovery options.
rules.title: Key Vault must enable purge protection
requiredActions: Set purge_protection_enabled = true on the azurerm_key_vault.

rules.threat: Without a soft-delete retention window, deleted secrets/keys cannot be recovered after a destructive action.
rules.title: Key Vault must set a soft-delete retention period
requiredActions: Set soft_delete_retention_days = 90 on the azurerm_key_vault.

rules.threat: An Azure SQL server with public network access enabled is reachable from the internet for brute force and exploitation.
rules.title: Azure SQL server must disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the azurerm_mssql_server and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: An AKS cluster without Kubernetes RBAC grants flat, unscoped access — any compromised credential is cluster-admin equivalent.
rules.title: AKS cluster must enable role-based access control
requiredActions: Set role_based_access_control_enabled = true on the azurerm_kubernetes_cluster.

rules.threat: Without infrastructure encryption, storage data has only a single encryption layer — defense-in-depth at rest is reduced.
rules.title: Storage account should enable infrastructure encryption
requiredActions: Set infrastructure_encryption_enabled = true on the azurerm_storage_account (set at creation time).

rules.threat: A PostgreSQL server without SSL enforcement accepts plaintext connections, exposing credentials and data on the wire.
rules.title: PostgreSQL server must enforce SSL
requiredActions: Set ssl_enforcement_enabled = true on the azurerm_postgresql_server.

rules.threat: A MySQL server without SSL enforcement accepts plaintext connections, exposing credentials and data on the wire.
rules.title: MySQL server must enforce SSL
requiredActions: Set ssl_enforcement_enabled = true on the azurerm_mysql_server.

rules.threat: Enabling the non-SSL Redis port lets cache traffic — often session tokens — be intercepted in plaintext.
rules.title: Redis cache must disable the non-SSL port
requiredActions: Set enable_non_ssl_port = false on the azurerm_redis_cache.

rules.threat: An App Service that accepts HTTP exposes session cookies and credentials to interception and downgrade.
rules.title: App Service must be HTTPS-only
requiredActions: Set https_only = true on the azurerm_app_service.

rules.threat: A Linux web app that accepts HTTP exposes session cookies and credentials to interception and downgrade.
rules.title: Linux web app must be HTTPS-only
requiredActions: Set https_only = true on the azurerm_linux_web_app.

rules.threat: A Function App that accepts HTTP exposes function keys and payloads to interception.
rules.title: Function App must be HTTPS-only
requiredActions: Set https_only = true on the azurerm_function_app.

rules.threat: A Key Vault with default-allow networking is reachable from any network — one leaked token away from secret exfiltration.
rules.title: Key Vault should restrict network access

remediate.snippet: Add network_acls { default_action = "Deny", bypass = "AzureServices", ip_rules = [...] } or a private endpoint. The allowed IPs/subnets must be chosen by a human.

requiredActions: Add network_acls with default_action = Deny (and a private endpoint) to the azurerm_key_vault.

rules.threat: An NSG rule with source '*' on admin ports (22/3389) exposes SSH/RDP to the entire internet for brute force.
rules.title: NSG rule must not allow admin ports from any source

remediate.snippet: Replace source_address_prefix = "*" with specific corporate CIDRs, or use Azure Bastion / JIT access for 22 and 3389. Auto-fix cannot choose a safe source.

requiredActions: Restrict source_address_prefix to known ranges on the azurerm_network_security_rule (especially for ports 22 and 3389).

rules.threat: A MariaDB server without SSL enforcement accepts plaintext connections, exposing credentials and data.
rules.title: MariaDB server must enforce SSL
requiredActions: Set ssl_enforcement_enabled = true on the azurerm_mariadb_server.

rules.threat: A Cosmos DB account with public network access is reachable from the internet for credential abuse and exfiltration.
rules.title: Cosmos DB account must disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the azurerm_cosmosdb_account and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: An App Service allowing TLS 1.0/1.1 exposes traffic to downgrade and known TLS weaknesses.
rules.title: App Service must require TLS 1.2 minimum
requiredActions: Set site_config { min_tls_version = "1.2" } on the azurerm_app_service.

rules.threat: A Linux web app allowing TLS 1.0/1.1 exposes traffic to downgrade and known TLS weaknesses.
rules.title: Linux web app must require TLS 1.2 minimum
requiredActions: Set site_config { minimum_tls_version = "1.2" } on the azurerm_linux_web_app.

rules.threat: A Linux VM that allows password authentication is exposed to SSH brute force and credential stuffing.
rules.title: Linux VM must disable password authentication
requiredActions: Set disable_password_authentication = true on the azurerm_linux_virtual_machine and use SSH keys.

rules.threat: Without Transparent Data Encryption, Azure SQL data files are unencrypted at rest.
rules.title: Azure SQL database must enable Transparent Data Encryption

remediate.snippet: TDE is on by default for new azurerm_mssql_database; confirm transparent_data_encryption_enabled = true and configure azurerm_mssql_server_transparent_data_encryption with a CMK if required.

requiredActions: Confirm Transparent Data Encryption is enabled (CMK if required) for the azurerm_mssql_database.

rules.threat: Without server auditing, malicious queries and data exfiltration against Azure SQL leave no trail.
rules.title: Azure SQL server should enable auditing

remediate.snippet: Add an azurerm_mssql_server_extended_auditing_policy for this server writing to a storage account / Log Analytics. The audit destination must be chosen.

requiredActions: Add an azurerm_mssql_server_extended_auditing_policy for the azurerm_mssql_server.

rules.threat: Without Azure Policy add-on, the cluster has no admission-time guardrails against insecure workloads.
rules.title: AKS cluster should enable the Azure Policy add-on
requiredActions: Set azure_policy_enabled = true on the azurerm_kubernetes_cluster.

rules.threat: AKS local accounts bypass Entra ID/RBAC — a leaked kubeconfig grants standing cluster access with no central revocation.
rules.title: AKS cluster should disable local accounts
requiredActions: Set local_account_disabled = true on the azurerm_kubernetes_cluster and use Entra ID integration.

rules.threat: Without blob soft delete, an overwrite or deletion (accidental or ransomware) is unrecoverable.
rules.title: Storage account should enable blob soft delete
requiredActions: Add blob_properties { delete_retention_policy { days = 7 } } to the azurerm_storage_account.

rules.threat: Allowing plain FTP deployment exposes credentials and content over an unencrypted channel.
rules.title: App Service should restrict FTP to FTPS
requiredActions: Set site_config { ftps_state = "FtpsOnly" } (or "Disabled") on the azurerm_app_service.

rules.threat: An Azure SQL server without an Entra ID administrator relies solely on SQL logins, weakening central identity control.
rules.title: Azure SQL server should have an Entra ID administrator

remediate.snippet: Add an azuread_administrator block (or azurerm_mssql_server_microsoft_support_auditing_policy) referencing a specific Entra ID principal/object_id. Auto-fix cannot choose the admin identity.

requiredActions: Configure an Entra ID administrator for the azurerm_mssql_server.

rules.threat: Vault access policies are coarse and hard to audit; RBAC gives scoped, centrally-managed, revocable access.
rules.title: Key Vault should use RBAC authorization

remediate.snippet: Set enable_rbac_authorization = true and migrate existing access_policy blocks to azurerm_role_assignment. Flipping this without migrating breaks access, so apply manually.

requiredActions: Migrate the azurerm_key_vault to enable_rbac_authorization = true and role assignments.

rules.threat: The ACR admin user is a shared static credential; if leaked it grants full push/pull, enabling image tampering.
rules.title: Container Registry must disable the admin user
requiredActions: Set admin_enabled = false on the azurerm_container_registry and use Entra ID / managed identity authentication.

rules.threat: A Container Registry with public network access can be reached for anonymous/credential-based pulls and pushes from the internet.
rules.title: Container Registry should disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the azurerm_container_registry and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: Without blob versioning, an overwrite (accidental or malicious) destroys the prior object with no rollback.
rules.title: Storage account should enable blob versioning
requiredActions: Add blob_properties { versioning_enabled = true } to the azurerm_storage_account.

rules.threat: Without container soft delete, a deleted container and all its blobs are unrecoverable.
rules.title: Storage account should enable container soft delete
requiredActions: Add blob_properties { container_delete_retention_policy { days = 7 } } to the azurerm_storage_account.

rules.threat: A Function App allowing TLS 1.0/1.1 exposes traffic to downgrade and known TLS weaknesses.
rules.title: Function App must require TLS 1.2 minimum
requiredActions: Set site_config { min_tls_version = "1.2" } on the azurerm_function_app.

rules.threat: A managed disk encrypted only with platform-managed keys offers less key control and revocation than a customer-managed key.
rules.title: Managed disk should use a customer-managed key

remediate.snippet: Set disk_encryption_set_id to an azurerm_disk_encryption_set backed by a Key Vault CMK. The DES resource must be supplied.

requiredActions: Attach a disk_encryption_set_id (CMK) to the azurerm_managed_disk.

rules.threat: A Key Vault secret with no expiration date stays valid forever if leaked, maximising the compromise window.
rules.title: Key Vault secrets/keys should set an expiration date

remediate.snippet: Set expiration_date (RFC3339) on the azurerm_key_vault_secret and rotate before expiry. Auto-fix cannot choose a meaningful expiry.

requiredActions: Set an expiration_date on the azurerm_key_vault_secret.

rules.threat: Remote debugging on an App Service exposes an attach point that can be abused to inspect or alter the running app.
rules.title: App Service must disable remote debugging
requiredActions: Set site_config { remote_debugging_enabled = false } on the azurerm_app_service.

rules.threat: The AKS HTTP application routing add-on creates a public DNS zone and ingress with weak controls, expanding exposure.
rules.title: AKS cluster must disable HTTP application routing
requiredActions: Set http_application_routing_enabled = false on the azurerm_kubernetes_cluster and use a managed ingress controller.

rules.threat: A Redis cache allowing TLS 1.0/1.1 exposes traffic to downgrade and known TLS weaknesses.
rules.title: Redis cache must require TLS 1.2 minimum
requiredActions: Set minimum_tls_version = "1.2" on the azurerm_redis_cache.

rules.threat: Shared-key access lets anyone with the account key bypass Entra ID/RBAC entirely — a leaked key is full data access.
rules.title: Storage account should disable shared key access
requiredActions: Set shared_access_key_enabled = false on the azurerm_storage_account and use Entra ID authentication (confirm all clients support it first).

rules.threat: A SQL firewall rule spanning 0.0.0.0 (Allow Azure Services) or 0.0.0.0-255.255.255.255 exposes the database broadly.
rules.title: Azure SQL firewall must not allow all addresses

remediate.snippet: Remove the 0.0.0.0 rule (Allow Azure Services) and the 0.0.0.0-255.255.255.255 rule; use specific IPs or a private endpoint. Auto-fix cannot choose a safe range.

requiredActions: Replace the broad azurerm_mssql_firewall_rule with specific source IPs or a private endpoint.

rules.threat: A Key Vault with public network access is reachable from the internet — one leaked token from secret exfiltration.
rules.title: Key Vault should disable public network access

remediate.snippet: Set public_network_access_enabled = false and add a private endpoint + network_acls. Confirm all clients reach the vault privately before applying.

requiredActions: Disable public network access on the azurerm_key_vault and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: A Service Bus namespace with public network access is reachable from the internet for credential abuse and message tampering.
rules.title: Service Bus namespace should disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the azurerm_servicebus_namespace and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: An Event Hub namespace with public network access is reachable from the internet for credential abuse and data interception.
rules.title: Event Hub namespace should disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the azurerm_eventhub_namespace and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: Cosmos DB local (key-based) auth bypasses Entra ID/RBAC — a leaked key is full, non-revocable data access.
rules.title: Cosmos DB should disable local (key) authentication
requiredActions: Set local_authentication_disabled = true on the azurerm_cosmosdb_account and use Entra ID RBAC (confirm clients support it first).

rules.threat: A Data Factory with public network access exposes its managed integration runtime and linked-service credentials.
rules.title: Data Factory should disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_enabled = false on the azurerm_data_factory and use a managed private endpoint.

rules.threat: An App Configuration store with public access exposes feature flags and configuration — sometimes containing secrets — to the internet.
rules.title: App Configuration should disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_access = "Disabled" on the azurerm_app_configuration and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: A Defender for Cloud plan left on the Free tier means no threat detection for that resource type — attacks go unalerted.
rules.title: Defender for Cloud plans must be on the Standard tier
requiredActions: Set tier = "Standard" on the azurerm_security_center_subscription_pricing for each resource_type (VirtualMachines, SqlServers, StorageAccounts, KeyVaults, Containers, AppServices, etc.).

rules.threat: Without incoming client certificates, an App Service cannot enforce mutual TLS for service-to-service callers.
rules.title: App Service should require incoming client certificates
requiredActions: Set client_cert_enabled = true on the azurerm_app_service (for internal/mTLS apps).

rules.threat: Without a security contact, Defender for Cloud alerts (including active-attack notifications) are not delivered to anyone.
rules.title: Defender for Cloud should have a security contact

remediate.snippet: Set email (and enable alert_notifications/alerts_to_admins) on the azurerm_security_center_contact. The contact address must be chosen.

requiredActions: Configure a security contact email with alert notifications enabled.

rules.threat: A PostgreSQL Flexible Server allowing non-TLS connections exposes credentials and data on the wire.
rules.title: PostgreSQL Flexible Server must require TLS

remediate.snippet: Ensure the require_secure_transport server parameter is ON via azurerm_postgresql_flexible_server_configuration { name = "require_secure_transport", value = "ON" }.

requiredActions: Set require_secure_transport = ON on the azurerm_postgresql_flexible_server.

rules.threat: A Cognitive/AI Search service with public network access is reachable from the internet for query abuse and data exfiltration.
rules.title: Search service should disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the azurerm_search_service and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: An Event Hub namespace allowing TLS 1.0/1.1 exposes traffic to downgrade and known TLS weaknesses.
rules.title: Event Hub namespace must require TLS 1.2 minimum
requiredActions: Set minimum_tls_version = "1.2" on the azurerm_eventhub_namespace.

rules.threat: A Service Bus namespace allowing TLS 1.0/1.1 exposes traffic to downgrade and known TLS weaknesses.
rules.title: Service Bus namespace must require TLS 1.2 minimum
requiredActions: Set minimum_tls_version = "1.2" on the azurerm_servicebus_namespace.

rules.threat: A Cosmos DB account allowing TLS 1.0/1.1 exposes traffic to downgrade and known TLS weaknesses.
rules.title: Cosmos DB account must require TLS 1.2 minimum
requiredActions: Set minimal_tls_version = "Tls12" on the azurerm_cosmosdb_account.

rules.threat: An AKS API server reachable from any IP is exposed to credential stuffing and API exploitation.
rules.title: AKS API server should restrict authorized IP ranges

remediate.snippet: Add api_server_access_profile { authorized_ip_ranges = [<admin-cidrs>] } (or a private cluster). The allowed CIDRs must be chosen.

requiredActions: Restrict the AKS API server via authorized_ip_ranges or a private cluster.

rules.threat: An Application Gateway without WAF has no managed protection against L7 attacks (injection, bots).
rules.title: Application Gateway should attach a WAF policy

remediate.snippet: Attach a firewall_policy_id (azurerm_web_application_firewall_policy in Prevention mode) or a waf_configuration block to the azurerm_application_gateway with a WAF_v2 SKU.

requiredActions: Attach a WAF policy (Prevention mode) to the azurerm_application_gateway.

rules.threat: An Azure SQL server allowing TLS 1.0/1.1 exposes database connections to downgrade and known TLS weaknesses.
rules.title: Azure SQL server must require TLS 1.2 minimum
requiredActions: Set minimum_tls_version = "1.2" on the azurerm_mssql_server.

rules.threat: A Redis cache with public network access is reachable from the internet for brute force and abuse.
rules.title: Redis cache should disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the azurerm_redis_cache and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: Cross-tenant object replication can move data out to an attacker-controlled tenant.
rules.title: Storage account should disable cross-tenant replication
requiredActions: Set cross_tenant_replication_enabled = false on the azurerm_storage_account.

rules.threat: A PostgreSQL server with public network access is reachable from the internet for brute force and exploitation.
rules.title: PostgreSQL server should disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the azurerm_postgresql_server and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: A MySQL server with public network access is reachable from the internet for brute force and exploitation.
rules.title: MySQL server should disable public network access
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the azurerm_mysql_server and use a private endpoint.

rules.threat: Allowing SQL logins alongside Entra ID means a leaked SQL password bypasses centralized identity controls.
rules.title: Azure SQL server should enforce Entra ID-only authentication

remediate.snippet: Set azuread_administrator { azuread_authentication_only = true, ... } on the azurerm_mssql_server. Confirm all clients use Entra ID auth before enabling.

requiredActions: Enforce Entra ID-only auth (azuread_authentication_only = true) on the azurerm_mssql_server.
